## Description

<!-- Brief description of the change and its motivation -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî New feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî Documentation only
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî Adding/updating tests
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî Maintenance (CI, dependencies)

## Checklist

- [ ] `tofu fmt -check -recursive` passes
- [ ] `tofu validate` passes
- [ ] `tofu test` passes (23 tests, ~3s)
- [ ] Comments explain **why**, using `DECISION:`/`COMPROMISE:`/`WORKAROUND:` prefixes
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated if design changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
